title: Incorrect result when using unnamed "?" bindings
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age UInt32, email String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('John Doe', 30, 'john@example.com');
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id UInt32, user_id UInt32, amount Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY order_id;
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users AS u JOIN orders AS o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.age > 18;
key_bug_features: Unnamed "?" bindings cause incorrect query results
